history.content:
[CONTEXT: Direct (own organization)]

Find all guest users in <TENANT> who haven't signed in for 90 days. Show their UPNs, who invited them, and the inviting domain. Don't remove anyone yet.
I'll pull stale guests and group them by inviter so you can decide who to keep. Calling Get-StaleGuests with DaysSinceSignIn=90.

Seven stale guests. Top finding: <UPN_2> invited 3 of them and is no longer with the company (their account is disabled). Recommend a /plan to either (a) /export the list to a CSV for legal review, or (b) bulk-remove everyone whose inviter is also off-boarded.

Let me know which direction and whether you want a 30-day grace window.
Export to CSV for now. Don't remove yet.
Got it. No removal. Calling Export-GuestList with a 90-day stale filter.
Exported 7 stale guests to <NAME_1>/guests-stale-2026-05-12.csv. Ready for legal review. Want me to schedule a /list followup in two weeks?
